entities.name: CONSERVATION AGRICULTURE
entities.description: A farming system based on minimum soil disturbance, organic soil cover, and crop rotations to improve food security and sustain natural resources

entities.name: TRADITIONAL TILLAGE
entities.description: Conventional soil preparation practices involving significant soil disturbance

entities.name: SOIL ORGANIC CARBON
entities.description: The carbon component of soil organic matter used as an indicator of soil health and carbon sequestration

entities.name: HYDRAULIC PROPERTIES
entities.description: Physical characteristics of soil that govern the movement and storage of water

entities.name: MALAWI
entities.description: The country in sub-Saharan Africa where the research was conducted

entities.name: MAIZE
entities.description: A primary cereal crop used in sole and intercropping systems in the study

entities.name: LEGUME
entities.description: Nitrogen-fixing crops used in intercropping with maize under conservation agriculture

entities.name: SUB-SAHARAN AFRICA
entities.description: The broader geographic region where conservation agriculture is promoted for smallholder farmers

entities.name: FOOD SECURITY
entities.description: The state of having reliable access to a sufficient quantity of affordable, nutritious food

entities.name: BULK DENSITY
entities.description: The mass of dry soil per unit volume, used to assess soil compaction

entities.name: SOIL WATER CHARACTERISTICS
entities.description: Properties relating to how soil holds and transmits water

entities.name: PORE SIZE DISTRIBUTION
entities.description: The distribution of different sizes of pores within the soil structure

entities.name: CARBON STOCKS
entities.description: The total amount of carbon stored in a specific volume or area of soil

entities.name: PARTICULATE ORGANIC CARBON
entities.description: A fraction of soil organic carbon that is relatively unstable and sensitive to management changes

entities.name: SOIL POROSITY
entities.description: The measure of void spaces in a soil, affecting aeration and water movement

entities.name: WATER RETENTION CAPACITY
entities.description: The ability of soil to hold water against the pull of gravity

entities.name: MESOPORES
entities.description: Medium-sized soil pores that contribute to water availability for plants

entities.name: MICROPORES
entities.description: Small-sized soil pores that hold water tightly

entities.name: SOIL ORGANIC MATTER
entities.description: The organic component of soil, consisting of plant and animal residues at various stages of decomposition

entities.name: SUSTAINABLE AGRICULTURE
entities.description: Farming practices that meet current food needs without compromising the ability of future generations to meet their own needs

entities.name: CROP ROTATION
entities.description: The practice of growing different crops in succession on the same land to improve soil health

entities.name: CHIPENI
entities.description: A specific site in Malawi where on-farm trials were conducted

entities.name: CHINGULUWE
entities.description: A specific site in Malawi where on-farm trials were conducted

entities.name: LEMU
entities.description: A specific site in Malawi where on-farm trials were conducted

entities.name: ZIDYANA
entities.description: A specific site in Malawi where on-farm trials were conducted

relationships.description: has lower levels than conservation agriculture
